name: PACSecurityScan
friendlyName: Power Apps Code App Security Scan
description: Scans Power Apps Code App source for DLP violations, CSP violations, hardcoded secrets, insecure fetch calls, and dependency vulnerabilities
author: pac-scan

inputs.name: command
inputs.label: Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose **Fetch Policy Snapshot** to pull the latest DLP/CSP policies from Power Platform, or **Run Security Scan** to analyse source code against the saved snapshot.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Target Environment
inputs.helpMarkDown: The environment name that maps to an entry in `pac-scan.config.yaml`.

inputs.name: failOnSeverity
inputs.label: Fail Build On Severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: The minimum finding severity that fails the pipeline. Overrides the threshold in `pac-scan.config.yaml`. Only applies to the **Run** command.

inputs.name: outputPath
inputs.label: Report Output Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory where the JSON scan report will be written. Defaults to the build artifact staging directory. Only applies to the **Run** command.
